source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A student has made a 3-bit binary down counter and connected it to the R-2R ladder type DAC \([ \text{Gain}=(-1k\Omega/2R)]\) as shown in the <image> to generate a staircase waveform. The output achieved is different as shown in the <image>. What could be the possible cause of this error?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: The connection from the counter of DAC is not proper.

choice_map.B: The counter is not working properly.
choice_map.C: The connection from the counter of DAC is not proper.
choice_map.D: The R and 2R resistances are interchanged.
